parsed.explanation: The original XML contained a structural error where a closing </TITLE> tag appeared in the middle of the text block, effectively splitting the title and leaving a trailing fragment of text outside of any tag before the next closing tag. I have consolidated the title text within a single <TITLE> element and removed the redundant/misplaced closing tag to ensure well-formedness.
